title: Mathematics: Arithmetic, Fractions & Geometry
subject: Mathematics
description: Master multiplication tables, long division, fraction operations, perimeter, area, and volume calculations.
learningObjectives: Solve multi-digit multiplication and division problems.
Add, subtract, and simplify fractions with common denominators.
Calculate Perimeter (P = 2L + 2W) and Area (A = L * W) of rectangular spaces.

lessons.title: Fractions & Equivalent Quantities
lessons.content: A fraction represents a part of a whole. The top number is the NUMERATOR (parts we have), and the bottom is the DENOMINATOR (total equal parts). 2/4 is equivalent to 1/2.

lessons.title: Calculating Perimeter and Area
lessons.content: Perimeter is the total distance around the outside of a shape (add all sides). Area is the total surface space inside (Length multiplied by Width). A garden 10 meters long and 5 meters wide has an area of 10 x 5 = 50 square meters.

flashcards.definition: The top number in a fraction showing how many parts are taken.
The bottom number in a fraction showing total equal parts in the whole.
The measurement of surface space inside a shape, measured in square units (L x W).

questions.question: What is the Area of a rectangular greenhouse that measures 8 feet wide by 12 feet long?
Simplify the fraction 4/8 to its lowest terms:

practicalChallenge.title: Homestead Garden Plot Geometry
practicalChallenge.instruction: Measure the floor or table in your room (Length x Width). Calculate both the total Perimeter and total Area in feet or meters!
